programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: The team members go against Cabe's advice and travel to Las Vegas for what they believe will be a simple job helping the owners of a casino. However, Walter is suspected of performing a heist and is arrested, so Scorpion is left to clear his name. Drama, inspired by a true story, starring Elyes Gabel, Eddie Kaye Thomas and Jadyn Wong

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A Navy reservist is found dead in his home with marks around his neck, and Gibbs and the team discover he was working on a highly classified case for the department of defence. The circumstances surrounding the man's demise lead the investigators to suspect someone was secretly trying to drive him insane, bringing them into contact with Samantha Ryan, the director of a division specialising in psychological warfare. Guest starring Jamie Lee Curtis

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Chief petty officer Leland Wiley dies of a heart attack just as he is about to reveal information on elusive arms dealer Agah Bayar. The team discovers the cardiac arrest was caused by someone hacking into a computer monitoring Wiley's pacemaker and increasing his heart rate to 400bpm. Meanwhile, a probationary agent tries to impress Gibbs and win a place on his team. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon, with Tamer Hassan and Matt L Jones

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Confidential files are leaked by an anonymous hacker, who threatens to release more unless the Navy agrees to renew a contract with a struggling shipbuilding firm. The Navy Secretary suspects the company's owner Philip Wickes is to blame, and asks NCIS to join forces with the PsyOps unit in an elaborate ruse to bring the culprit out of hiding. Meanwhile, Gibbs' colleagues begin to notice his attraction to his opposite number Samantha Ryan. Guest starring Jamie Lee Curtis

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Vance's brother-in-law Michael Thomas is linked to the murder of a petty officer, and Gibbs is placed under pressure to clear the man's name. Meanwhile, a negative performance review leaves Tony feeling downhearted and he resolves to prove the assessment wrong by being less chatty while on duty. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Rocky Carroll

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A marine lieutenant's body falls from the sky and the team links the man's death to the disappearance of a Navy chaplain thought to have been kidnapped by rebels working with Colombian crime cartels. Ziva and Tony are dispatched to conduct a rescue operation and enlist the help of former Interpol agent Monique Lisson, while Gibbs discovers there was more to the chaplain's outreach mission than meets the eye. Crime drama, guest starring Karina Lombard (The L Word) and Jamie Lee Curtis (A Fish Called Wanda)

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: A murder hunt is launched when Reshna's body is pulled out of the Thames and evidence emerges that she was having an affair with a fellow student. Meanwhile, Diane and Mickey are left in the dark when an eccentric mugging victim claims to be an undercover officer and Scotland Yard refuse to confirm or deny her story. Jenny Eclair stars

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Emma is feeling raw after her marital difficulties boiled over into violence and shows her tough side to new recruit Beth Green (former EastEnder Louisa Lytton) as they investigate a woman's claim her baby has been stolen. Jack is anxious to prove he's a worthy DCI and agrees to go undercover with Sam to get a lead on the illegal baby-selling business, but his mistake puts the DI in danger

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Will and Nikki investigate the suspicious death of a child protection officer on the Cheetham estate. New recruit Beth delivers her first caution following an affray between a car salesman and a woman protesting against the dangers of 4x4 vehicles, but there's more to the conflict than first meets the eye. Boothby Graffoe guest stars

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Nikki coaxes a potential suicide down from a factory building and urges him to give information on the child pornography ring he has been invited to join. Reg and Phil are called to a funeral home where a valuable necklace has been taken from a corpse in a sealed coffin. Siobhan Redmond guest stars as Scene of Crime Officer Lorna Hart

programme.title: Catherine Cookson's The Round Tower
programme.desc: Feature-length drama set in the 1950s, starring Emilia Fox as the rebellious teenage daughter of a successful businessman and his devoted wife, whose disenchantment with her privileged upbringing ultimately provokes a scandal in their small town. Keith Barron and Jan Harvey also star

programme.title: Victoria Wood's Midlife Christmas
programme.desc: A festive special from 2009 that attempts to cram an entire night's Christmas viewing into 60 minutes. Highlights include the Midlife Olympics 2009, popular costume drama Lark Pies to Cranchesterford and the adventures of soap star Bo Beaumont, played by Victoria's long-time collaborator Julie Walters. Others joining in the fun are Delia Smith, Jayne Torvill, Christopher Dean, Reece Shearsmith and Anton Du Beke

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Barbara helps a pregnant mother-of-two whose husband has recently died, and is on hand to give her support when a further tragedy drives her and her children from their home. Lucille teaches a health and relationships class at the youth club, only to encounter a furious mother who objects to her daughter attending. Sister Monica Joan goes into hospital for cataract surgery

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Barbara's condition is not improving and she is kept in isolation at the hospital, leaving her friends able to do nothing but wait for more news. Dr Turner and Shelagh assist a man being held in a remand home whose wife is pregnant, while Lucille makes some new friends

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: The nurses and midwives of Nonnatus House prepare to celebrate Sister Monica Joan's birthday, but plans are put on hold when the closure of a nearby maternity home leaves them inundated with new patients, many of whom are in urgent need of support. Lucille treats a woman whose father is offering shelter to an old friend suffering with memory loss, and as November 22, 1963 arrives, the residents of Poplar are rocked by shocking news from America

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: As Poplar prepares for Christmas, the nuns travel to the Mother House to elect a new mother superior. Sister Julienne is the obvious replacement and must face this possibility as her future at Nonnatus House hangs in the balance. As they ready to leave, Sister Mildred, an indefatigable member of their order, arrives unexpectedly with four Chinese orphans en route to the Children's Home at the Mother House while, back in Poplar, Trixie returns from Portofino with her troubles behind her and Valerie leads the baby ballet Christmas performance

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The second of a two-part story picks up where things left off last week, with Humphrey, Florence and Dwayne having swapped the sun and sand of the Caribbean for the cold and noise of London. Their latest investigation has taken them back to the detective inspector's home town - but they've hit a brick wall with the discovery of another dead body. And now they have two murders to solve. Meanwhile, Dwayne has an emotional encounter and Humphrey receives advice from an unexpected source that helps him reach a big decision. Crime drama, starring Kris Marshall, Danny John-Jules and Josephine Jobert, with guest appearances from Ardal O'Hanlon and Sally Bretton

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch visits his brother Jasper in Victoria, British Columbia, for the Christmas holidays, but they end up investigating a murder connected to an archaeologist working on the site of an ancient settlement. Festive edition of the crime drama, starring Yannick Bisson

programme.title: Taggart
programme.desc: A young boy falls into a creek and drowns, while his mother is found slumped in the hallway. Dr Stephen Andrews discovers both ingested rat poison, and suspicion falls on the grieving husband and father. The detective soon uncovers a sordid case of extortion and forgery as part of his investigation. Crime drama, starring Mark McManus

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Tracey has a surprising announcement to make, while Sharon's pregnancy quest carries on unabated and Dorien at last finds a way to make the most out of Marcus. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson

programme.title: The Bill

Heaton reassures terrified prosecution witness Martin Turnbull he will be given protection following threats from Ray Moore, only to discover the villainous ex-cop has subtler ways of intimidating people

Daisha unwittingly treats the hit-and-run driver, while Jac struggles to run Darwin in Connie's absence, and her calls for help go unanswered as Joseph remains preoccupied with Faye's fidelity

programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: Fin is branded a killer at a press conference celebrating his heroism when grieving husband Karl disrupts the proceedings. New doctor Selena causes a stir and puts Bex in an awkward spot, and there's little love lost between Nina and her stepsister when the pair find themselves working together. Drama, guest starring Christopher Timothy, with Elizabeth Carling and Kwame Kwei-Armah

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: A gang member is shot and his dying words in the ambulance are the name of corrupt ex-policeman Ray Moore. Phil's first day back in plain clothes gets off to a bad start

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: An irate Sanjay searches for Lydia who's late again. Pauline is uplifted by Willy's 'plan of action', but Mark is not convinced. Roy is busy hatching a plan

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: David agrees to pay for Bianca's wedding. David and Cindy's romantic evening is ended by unwelcome visitor. Vince and Ollie cause Steve problems

programme.title: Catherine Cookson's The Secret
programme.desc: Feature-length dramatisation of the writer's only thriller, set in 19th-century Tyneside. Colin Buchanan stars as successful businessman Freddie Musgrave, who has worked hard for 20 years to live down his misspent youth as runner to a gang of smugglers and is shocked when a face appears from long ago, threatening to reveal the details of his sordid past. With Clare Higgins and June Whitfield

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Compo, Clegg and Foggy decide to invite long-lost school friends from the town for a drink at the pub on Christmas Eve. Festive instalment of the long-running comedy from 1981, starring Peter Sallis, Brian Wilde and Bill Owen

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Festive special from 1978. Foggy films a video message to send to Nora's ailing brother in Australia, so he can be reminded what a traditional British Christmas is like. Brian Wilde and Kathy Staff star

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Howard gets a bargain when he buys a used car, but the attention he gets from a burly local is more than he bargained for. Long-running comedy, starring Robert Fyfe and Peter Sallis

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: When an old foe tells him that she has arranged the death of her former lover, Father Brown soon finds himself blamed for the murder. Mark Williams stars

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Another mystery for the cops on the island of Saint Marie, where the sun shines all day and it seems half the residents are killers-in-waiting. However, it's all change for the team. DI Jack Mooney (Ardal O'Hanlon) is now in charge, and his first Caribbean case sees the reopening of a seven-year-old murder when a tourist provides an alibi for the woman convicted of the crime

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: An armoured security van is discovered at the bottom of a lake, and the team makes a link to a disappearance 17 years previously and an unsolved killing, prompting them to reopen the case. Sandra feels she is making progress after finding the murder weapon, but suffers a setback when a key witness is killed. Detective drama, starring Amanda Redman

programme.title: Spooks
programme.desc: The team is reeling from Lucas's betrayal, with acting leader Erin Watts keeping things ticking over while Harry is under disciplinary action. But following a tribunal, the head of Section D is quickly back on the Grid, in time to investigate the assassination of a retired spy he worked with in Berlin during the Cold War. Meanwhile, a Russian minister has arrived in London to negotiate a ground-breaking strategic partnership with the UK - and it seems he is the next target for the killer. Peter Firth heads the cast in the final run of the acclaimed spy drama, co-starring Lara Pulver, Geoffrey Streatfeild, Jonathan Hyde, Alice Krige and Simon Russell Beale

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: A gang member is shot and his dying words in the ambulance are the name of corrupt ex-policeman Ray Moore. Heaton struggles to find evidence linking the victim with his arch enemy, but Lewis's contacts reveal the red scorpion tag sprayed on all of Moore's properties was the dead man's handiwork. Phil's first day back in plain clothes gets off to a bad start

programme.title: Judge John Deed
programme.desc: The powers-that-be pile the pressure on Deed to acquit a violent MI5 informer who may be able to infiltrate the Real IRA, leading him to cross swords with the Lord Chancellor's department. programme.desc: Faye realises she must tell Joseph the truth when he walks out of theatre unable to complete an operation. programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: Comfort discovers she's pregnant and plans a romantic dinner for Fin, but his ambulance is involved in an accident while attending a bogus call. programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Phil is impressed with Steve and promises to help him out. Pauline is astounded by a lack of support for her cause and David forces Ricky to make dramatic decision

programme.title: Classic EastEnders

programme.title: Catherine Cookson's A Dinner of Herbs
programme.desc: First in a two-part drama, starring Billie Whitelaw as a herbalist who takes an 11-year-old orphan under her wing. The youngster soon makes friends with a local girl and the future looks rosy - but heartbreak is waiting just around the corner. With Tim Healy, Jonathan Kerrigan and Michael Jayston

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Compo, Clegg and Foggy head for the seaside to spend Christmas in a caravan, leaving Sid and Wally behind. Festive instalment of the long-running rural comedy from 1982, starring Peter Sallis, Bill Owen and Brian Wilde

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Feeling somewhat less than merry, Compo, Clegg and Foggy visit a friend in hospital before opening their presents. Meanwhile, Sid, Ivy, Nora and Wally Batty, have their relatives over to dinner. Christmas special from 1978, starring Peter Sallis, Bill Owen and Brian Wilde

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Howard discovers he has mistakenly agreed to take Pearl and Marina out to dinner at the same time. Long-running comedy from the pen of Roy Clarke, starring Robert Fyfe, Peter Sallis and Frank Thornton

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Past and present collide when the sleuth investigates the macabre world of doll's house crime scenes. Crime drama based on the stories by GK Chesterton, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The Saint Marie mayoral elections are thrown into disarray when one of the candidates is stabbed to death in the polling booth while casting his vote. Can DI Jack Mooney and his team get to the bottom of this political puzzle? Ardal O'Hanlon stars

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The team reopens an investigation into the death of an elderly woman whose decision to leave her estate to her cats sparked a family feud. The subsequent sudden death of the felines, which means the estate reverts to her relatives, prompts a neighbour to insist the detectives get to the bottom of her mysterious demise. Drama, guest starring Eric Sykes, Lindsey Coulson and Victor McGuire

programme.title: Spooks
programme.desc: Calum is attacked by muggers who take his laptop containing classified information on MI5's undercover agents, leading to a race against time to prevent the next spy on the list being attacked. Meanwhile, Harry meets Elena at the ballet, but Russian counter-intelligence agents are on her trail, forcing her son, Sasha, to take action to prevent his mother being revealed as a former western spy. Peter Firth, Alice Krige and Geoffrey Streatfeild star

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Lewis's girlfriend nurse Tash Niles is attacked in the hospital car park, raising the terrifying prospect that Ray Moore is targeting people who could testify against him. Diane encounters a pensioner who turns out to be a fan of Reg's podcast Regflections - and clearly has other guilty secrets to hide

programme.title: Judge John Deed
programme.desc: Jo Mills takes on the case of a worker killed on a building site, convinced that the managing director of the company should be held accountable for his neglect of health and safety legislation. However, the Lord Chancellor's department once again try to divert the course of justice to avoid embarrassment - and Deed's ex-wife is appointed counsel for the defence.
