programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Hathaway and Lewis struggle to determine whether a death during a college-based clinical trial for a new antidepressant was murder or suicide, and receive little assistance from the institution's evasive psychiatric professor. A second student's demise then leads to the revelation that the trial's participants are all operating under the influence of a mind-altering drug, and that the lines between love, obsession and madness have become dangerously blurred. Guest starring Douglas Henshall (Primeval), Lucy Liemann (Rev) and Thomas Brodie Sangster (Love Actually)

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Hathaway and Lewis investigate the murder of a businesswoman connected with an organisation that supports gifted children, who had apparently been blackmailing the father of one particularly promising youngster. Further deaths follow, and as the body count rises, they realise there is a decades-old secret at the heart of the case. Matters are complicated still further by the presence in Oxford of former MI5 spymaster Grace Orde, who is visiting to sign copies of her tell-all memoir - which provides a vital clue to the killer's identity. Detective drama, guest starring Anna Chancellor and Cherie Lunghi, with Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The detective investigates after a botanist accidentally unearths the body of a recently buried professor who was fixated upon solving a seemingly impossible riddle by Lewis Carroll. The victim had a long-standing rivalry with his brother - giving Lewis and Hathaway an obvious suspect - but the case is hindered by the mind games of two students who seem intent on causing trouble in their quest to gain admittance to a mysterious club. Guest starring Celia Imrie and James Fleet, with Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: A professor feels humiliated when her internet dating video is leaked onto a website and watched by her students. The next morning she is found dead, the victim of what appears to be a straightforward suicide. However, Lewis is not convinced and digs deeper, identifying several suspects including the site's founder - but as he and Hathaway get closer to the truth amid a rising death toll, they find their personal and professional lives dredged up online for all to see. Guest starring Roxanne McKee (Game of Thrones) and Toby Stephens (Die Another Day), with Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A man's apparent suicide in an armoured car shocks the village of Morton Fendle, but things take a more sinister turn upon the discovery he was not alone when he died. Top of Barnaby and Jones's list of suspects is the victim's missing girlfriend - whose mysterious hold over the war-blighted residents could provide the key to the mystery. John Nettles and Jason Hughes star

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Japp and Poirot investigate the murder of an actress's estranged husband, only to find in the theatrical world, where deception and play-acting are a way of life, nothing is quite what it seems. In time-honoured fashion, it initially looks as though the butler did it - but subsequent inquiries throw up a veritable rogues' gallery of equally likely suspects. Philip Jackson, David Suchet and Hugh Fraser star

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Jenny's younger brother Steve pays a visit, and soon begins to threaten her relationship with Merton. Meanwhile, David sets his sights on joining a mod gang causing havoc in the village. Sarah Tansey, Thom Fell, Maureen O'Brien and Robert East star

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: As Brent Park Cricket Club prepare for the opening ceremony of their new pitch and pavilion, Mim arranges a big surprise for Rog - but disaster is waiting in the wings. Comedy drama, starring Brenda Blethyn, Robert Daws, Timothy Spall and Josie Lawrence

programme.title: Carry On Abroad (1972)
programme.desc: British holiday-makers jet off on a package holiday to the Spanish resort of Elsbels. Unluckily, not only is the hotel short of staff, but it also has no walls, ceilings or entertainment. Further mishaps leave the tourists fuming - until they sample a local punch laced with an aphrodisiac. Comedy, with Sid James, Kenneth Williams, Charles Hawtrey and Joan Sims

programme.title: Bugsy Malone (1976)
programme.desc: Alan Parker's slapstick musical comedy, featuring a cast composed entirely of children and following a war between rival gangsters in 1920s New York - fought with custard pies and cream-firing Tommy guns. When a slick mobster acquires devastating new weapons, his arch rival enlists the aid of a small-time chancer to steal them. Starring Scott Baio, Florrie Dugger and John Cassisi, with Jodie Foster in an early appearance

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Joe prepares to take up his new post in London, but secretly regrets the decision to leave the Yorkshire Moors. However, the arrival of his replacement PC Wetherby signals it is too late to change his mind. Nurse Carol is administering vaccinations at the school when she notices extensive bruising on a boy's body and suspects he is being abused. The youngster lives with his mother and stepfather, but recently his biological father has been back in touch, trying to see the boy - something the courts will not allow. However, tragedy strikes when conflict grows between the angry father and stepfather - with one of the Aidensfield bobbies caught in the crossfire. Rupert Ward-Lewis joins the cast

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kathy complains to Eric about the youngsters the wine bar is attracting. Eric asks Zoe about Steve's financial situation. Kim places a large bet on a horse race

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Lisa worries when Zak doesn't come home all night. Jack and Sarah plan a family meal for their anniversary. Vic has a surprise in store for Viv

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Sally wonders why Kevin is moody all the time. Alec warns Rita against going into partnership with Jack. Judy tells Gary about the laparoscopy and her abortion

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Gary is angry that Judy kept her abortion a secret. Steve is convinced he will win Fiona back. Kevin breaks down in front of Natalie, telling her he cannot cope

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The murder of a babysitter throws up a number of questions for Lewis and Hathaway - was she the intended victim or was the killer targeting her employers? Was the crime calculated or opportunistic? And why was she elaborately tied up after being murdered? As the detectives dig for clues, they are led into a world of suburban swinging and fetish photography, far removed from the Oxford they know. Gary Kemp (The Krays), Lucy Cohu (The Awakening), Ciaran McMenamin (Primeval) and Georgia Taylor (Casualty) guest star

programme.title: The Comedy Years
programme.desc: A look back at TV comedy from 1979. It was a pivotal year for Britain, with a new prime minister in Margaret Thatcher and mass strikes leading to the so-called 'Winter of Discontent'. Television saw a return to political satire, with the BBC series Not the Nine O'Clock News, though the northern club scene was dominating comedic output at the time with the likes of The Cannon & Ball Show and the stand-up series The Comedians. Narrated by Hugh Bonneville

programme.title: The Comedy Years
programme.desc: Comedy milestones of 1984, when cult hits like The Young Ones and Alas Smith and Jones battled it out in the schedules with more mainstream fare like Russ Abbot's Madhouse, and politicians were targeted by one of the most irreverent TV shows of all time - Spitting Image. Fans also lost two of the greatest comedy stars of all time - Tommy Cooper and Eric Morecambe. Narrated by Hugh Bonneville

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: Shaun Evans returns as the young Inspector Morse in the first of four feature-length episodes. A baffling suicide, an anguished father searching for his missing daughter and the smash-and-grab robbery of medieval artefacts throw the detective in at the deep end as he resumes his role with Oxford City Police following a four-month absence from duty. As the locals go to the polls in a closely fought by-election and a beauty contest builds to its conclusion, Endeavour must navigate the choppy waters of both worlds as his investigation shakes the highest pillars of Oxford society. Co-starring Roger Allam, Anton Lesser, James Bradshaw, Jack Laskey and Sean Rigby

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Businessman and owner of the Causton Lions rugby team Mark Adler is mysteriously found dead in the club's cryotherapy chamber, which is normally used by the players for physiotherapy. Barnaby and Winter are called in to investigate and their list of suspects soon includes Adler's wife Samantha, former coach Guy Bevan, troubled star player Danny Wickham and physio Neville Gallagher. Neil Dudgeon stars, with Tamzin Outhwaite, Don Gilet and Michael Maloney

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Hathaway and Lewis investigate the murder of a businesswoman connected with an organisation that supports gifted children, who had apparently been blackmailing the father of one particularly promising youngster. Further deaths follow, and as the body count rises, they realise there is a decades-old secret at the heart of the case. Matters are complicated still further by the presence in Oxford of former MI5 spymaster Grace Orde, who is visiting to sign copies of her tell-all memoir - which provides a vital clue to the killer's identity. Detective drama, guest starring Anna Chancellor and Cherie Lunghi, with Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The dapper detective accepts an invitation to spend yuletide at the house of an elderly millionaire who seems intent on provoking his money-grubbing sons into murdering him. At first he tries hard to ignore the strained atmosphere and relax - but soon finds himself with a gruesome mystery on his hands. Agatha Christie whodunit, starring David Suchet and Philip Jackson

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Japp and Poirot investigate the murder of an actress's estranged husband, only to find in the theatrical world, where deception and play-acting are a way of life, nothing is quite what it seems. programme.title: Carry On Doctor (1967)
programme.desc: A popular doctor is sacked after a misunderstanding ruins his reputation, prompting the furious patients to stage a revolt against the luckless medic's strait-laced superiors. Meanwhile, the hospital head has his own problems after becoming the unlikely romantic target of a strict matron. Comedy, with Frankie Howerd, Jim Dale, Sid James, Kenneth Williams, Charles Hawtrey and Hattie Jacques

programme.title: Willy Wonka and the Chocolate Factory (1971)
programme.desc: An eccentric confectionery king announces that five children will be given a tour of his wondrous factory. The winners turn out to be a kind-hearted boy from a penniless family and four obnoxious brats, who face a terrible fate when they misbehave. Musical fantasy, based on Roald Dahl's classic book Charlie and the Chocolate Factory, starring Gene Wilder, Jack Albertson, Peter Ostrum and Roy Kinnear

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Gina struggles to cope with Phil's death and refuses Carol's offer to prescribe her sleeping pills, determined to deal with things on her own. However, with the funeral scheduled for the next day, an emotional service that sees the whole of Aidensfield turning out to say their farewells to the much-loved bobby, it seems the grieving landlady is expecting too much of herself. Over at the station, Don is racked with guilt over the shooting of his colleague, convinced he should have taken the bullet. Despite George's reassurances, the bobby believes the villagers will blame him for the death of a close friend and decides to pack his bags - until the sergeant makes him a proposition. Meanwhile, the officers investigate the suspected suicide of a local teacher and Carol fails to report an elderly motorist involved in a hit-and-run with a cyclist, which proves particularly embarrassing when the victim turns out to be the hospital's new doctor. Leon Ockenden joins the cast

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Biff starts his job as Tara's chauffeur. Chris enjoys all the gossip about Steve and Kim's problems. Becky agrees that Emma can stay with the Sugdens

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Steve is furious with Kim for selling her shares in Home Farm. Vic and Viv arrange to spend more time together. Alan worries about trade at the Woolpack

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Mike gets an order for 25,000 knickers. Judy breaks down when she is told she si not able to have children. Jack is annoyed when Alec makes an offer for the pub

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Angie is surprised when Chris offers to move out. Sally tells Kevin she knows he is keeping something from her. Fiona tells Steve he is wasting his time pursuing her

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: A visiting American academic delivers a controversial speech, with many audience members worried his ideas could be used to target ethnic minorities. So when he is found hanged the next morning and Dr Hobson quickly discounts suicide, Lewis and Hathaway realise they have many suspects - from the local anti-racism activist who was first in voicing her disgust at the professor's beliefs to the women who had bombarded him with threatening e-mails. But then another body turns up and the case takes on a new dimension. David Soul and Patrick Baladi guest star

programme.title: Tommy Cooper Forever
programme.desc: First in a two-part tribute to the comedy magician, revealing how an act that started out in the desert during the Second World War went on to take the entertainment world by storm. Narrated by Martin Clunes and featuirng contributions from famous fans including Jennifer Saunders, Simon Callow, Lionel Blair, Anita Harris, Les Dennis and Jerome Flynn

programme.title: Tommy Cooper Forever
programme.desc: Part two of two. Singer and actress Anita Harris retraces her footsteps back to the London Palladium where she worked with Tommy. Comedian Les Dennis makes an emotional trip back to Her Majesty's Theatre to remember the night he saw Tommy's final performance. Plus, how Cooper became an unlikely comedy hero on Dutch TV in the 1960s

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: As England and Argentina kick off in the World Cup quarter-final, Oxford's streets are deserted. At an almost empty museum, Adrian Weiss, a specialist in heraldry and genealogy, is found dead - slain by a ceremonial dagger with links to 19th-century India. An entry in the visitors' book leads Morse to a girls' boarding school, where a note reading 'Save Me' is mysteriously slipped into his coat pocket. Digging into the building's troubled history, he finds a connection between Weiss's untimely fate and a series of unsolved murders that occurred on the school's grounds almost 100 years earlier. 1960s-set drama, starring Shaun Evans, with Roger Allam, Anton Lesser, James Bradshaw and Abigail Thaw

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When Barnaby is dragged along to the wedding of the son of Sarah's friend Hazel, the last thing he expects to find himself doing is investigating a murder. But when his wife discovers the body of the bride, Laurel, who has been squeezed to death by her own wedding dress corset, the detective must look more closely at his fellow guests. The victim's husband Gavin is convinced that his wife's death had everything to do with her outspoken nature on her radio show, so Winter's attention soon turns to her unique community of nocturnal listeners. Gavin's scorned ex-fiancee and local wedding dress designer Serena also comes under suspicion, and Barnaby and Winter's enquiries lead them to a local wedding fayre. Neil Dudgeon stars, with Kelly Brook, Nick Hancock and Liz Fraser

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Crime drama starring Brenda Blethyn. The detective investigates a fire that rips through a holiday park on the Northumberland coast, destroying three cabins. A young woman's body is discovered and the resort's owner, Jim Viner, fears the victim is his sister Deena when he returns from a weekend away with his daughter Clare. With Jim's suspicions confirmed, a police report then reveals Clare's boyfriend Ryan and his friends had been partying near the scene hours before the blaze started, but where are they now, and where is Deena's best friend Sally? Co-starring Kenny Doughty, Cush Jumbo and Jon Morrison

programme.title: A Christmas Carol
programme.desc: Ross Kemp plays loan shark Eddie Scrooge, whose legendary cruelty strikes fear into the hearts of the poor borrowers who live on his crumbling estate. Anticipating a profitable Christmas Day - when his clients will all be at home - he is shocked, and none too pleased, by the appearance the night before of his deceased business partner Jacob Marley. Worse still, the grim ghost is on a mission to show Eddie the error of his ways in a terrifying journey through the past, present and future. Also starring Warren Mitchell, Ray Fearon and Liz Smith

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective is ordered to take a holiday for the benefit of his health, and with Hastings and Miss Lemon in tow, reluctantly heads for the tranquillity of Devon's coast, where his relaxation is soon ruined by the discovery of a socialite's murdered body on the beach. Several people had reason for wishing Arlena Stuart dead, but high on the list of suspects are her husband, teenage son and a troubled vicar. David Suchet, Hugh Fraser, Philip Jackson and Pauline Moran star

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: Rog gets busy organising the team's first match, while Mim tries to cheer up Bob after Ginnie gives him his marching orders. Maggie's sister inadvertently lets slip a secret - with devastating consequences. Cricketing comedy drama, starring Brenda Blethyn

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Carry On Henry (1971)
programme.desc: King Henry VIII plots to rid himself of his new French wife when her craving for garlic becomes too much to cope with. However, he cannot afford to anger the king of France, and tries to make it look as if his queen has had an affair. Comedy, starring Sid James, Joan Sims, Kenneth Williams, Terry Scott, Charles Hawtrey, Barbara Windsor and Kenneth Connor

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: A wartime memento prompts Sid and Jean to visit Paris. Comedy, starring Sid James and Diana Coupland

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Omnibus. David reaches a sad decision regarding Shona. Maria overhears Sarah accusing Gary of murder. Toyah and Imran adjust to becoming parents overnight

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Omnibus. Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Hathaway and Lewis struggle to determine whether a death during a college-based clinical trial for a new antidepressant was murder or suicide, and receive little assistance from the institution's evasive psychiatric professor. A second student's demise then leads to the revelation that the trial's participants are all operating under the influence of a mind-altering drug, and that the lines between love, obsession and madness have become dangerously blurred. Guest starring Douglas Henshall (Primeval), Lucy Liemann (Rev) and Thomas Brodie Sangster (Love Actually)

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Hathaway and Lewis investigate the murder of a businesswoman connected with an organisation that supports gifted children, who had apparently been blackmailing the father of one particularly promising youngster. Further deaths follow, and as the body count rises, they realise there is a decades-old secret at the heart of the case. Matters are complicated still further by the presence in Oxford of former MI5 spymaster Grace Orde, who is visiting to sign copies of her tell-all memoir - which provides a vital clue to the killer's identity. Detective drama, guest starring Anna Chancellor and Cherie Lunghi, with Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The detective investigates after a botanist accidentally unearths the body of a recently buried professor who was fixated upon solving a seemingly impossible riddle by Lewis Carroll. The victim had a long-standing rivalry with his brother - giving Lewis and Hathaway an obvious suspect - but the case is hindered by the mind games of two students who seem intent on causing trouble in their quest to gain admittance to a mysterious club. Guest starring Celia Imrie and James Fleet, with Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: A professor feels humiliated when her internet dating video is leaked onto a website and watched by her students. The next morning she is found dead, the victim of what appears to be a straightforward suicide. However, Lewis is not convinced and digs deeper, identifying several suspects including the site's founder - but as he and Hathaway get closer to the truth amid a rising death toll, they find their personal and professional lives dredged up online for all to see. Guest starring Roxanne McKee (Game of Thrones) and Toby Stephens (Die Another Day), with Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A man's apparent suicide in an armoured car shocks the village of Morton Fendle, but things take a more sinister turn upon the discovery he was not alone when he died. Top of Barnaby and Jones's list of suspects is the victim's missing girlfriend - whose mysterious hold over the war-blighted residents could provide the key to the mystery. John Nettles and Jason Hughes star

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Japp and Poirot investigate the murder of an actress's estranged husband, only to find in the theatrical world, where deception and play-acting are a way of life, nothing is quite what it seems. In time-honoured fashion, it initially looks as though the butler did it - but subsequent inquiries throw up a veritable rogues' gallery of equally likely suspects. Philip Jackson, David Suchet and Hugh Fraser star

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Jenny's younger brother Steve pays a visit, and soon begins to threaten her relationship with Merton. Meanwhile, David sets his sights on joining a mod gang causing havoc in the village. Sarah Tansey, Thom Fell, Maureen O'Brien and Robert East star

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: As Brent Park Cricket Club prepare for the opening ceremony of their new pitch and pavilion, Mim arranges a big surprise for Rog - but disaster is waiting in the wings. Comedy drama, starring Brenda Blethyn, Robert Daws, Timothy Spall and Josie Lawrence

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: Roger gets a frosty response when he introduces new team member Clive to the others, while Kev and Mag present Mim with a motorised lawn-mower. Cricketing comedy drama, starring Brenda Blethyn, Robert Daws, Timothy Spall and Josie Lawrence

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Omnibus. Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales

programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maud suspects that Maureen has a new boyfriend. Rita is pleased to see Sally back. Bill offers to babysit so Sally and Kevin can go away for the weekend together

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Rita refuses to lend Jack the money he needs, and he suggests that Rita buys a 50 per cent share of the pub. Janice steals underwear from the factory

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kim and Steve row after she is told they are now bankrupt. Zoe tells Kim about Miss Jinks escaping. Tara crashes her car and is breathalysed by the police

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Steve desperately tries to make back some of his losses. Tara is sure she is going to lose her driving licence. Jan has some unwanted news for Ned

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: When a man dies falling from a bridge Joe discovers the deceased and his girlfriend were implicated in a baby's disappearance three years previously. Foul play is suspected when the man's post-mortem reveals injuries consistent with a recent fight, and deeper delving suggests someone still believes the couple were responsible for the missing child. Elsewhere, Peggy's new look and odd behaviour causes a stir

programme.title: Carry On Abroad (1972)
programme.desc: British holiday-makers jet off on a package holiday to the Spanish resort of Elsbels. Unluckily, not only is the hotel short of staff, but it also has no walls, ceilings or entertainment. Further mishaps leave the tourists fuming - until they sample a local punch laced with an aphrodisiac. Comedy, with Sid James, Kenneth Williams, Charles Hawtrey and Joan Sims

programme.title: Bugsy Malone (1976)
programme.desc: Alan Parker's slapstick musical comedy, featuring a cast composed entirely of children and following a war between rival gangsters in 1920s New York - fought with custard pies and cream-firing Tommy guns. When a slick mobster acquires devastating new weapons, his arch rival enlists the aid of a small-time chancer to steal them. Starring Scott Baio, Florrie Dugger and John Cassisi, with Jodie Foster in an early appearance

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Joe prepares to take up his new post in London, but secretly regrets the decision to leave the Yorkshire Moors. However, the arrival of his replacement PC Wetherby signals it is too late to change his mind. Nurse Carol is administering vaccinations at the school when she notices extensive bruising on a boy's body and suspects he is being abused. The youngster lives with his mother and stepfather, but recently his biological father has been back in touch, trying to see the boy - something the courts will not allow. However, tragedy strikes when conflict grows between the angry father and stepfather - with one of the Aidensfield bobbies caught in the crossfire. Rupert Ward-Lewis joins the cast

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kathy complains to Eric about the youngsters the wine bar is attracting. Eric asks Zoe about Steve's financial situation. Kim places a large bet on a horse race

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Lisa worries when Zak doesn't come home all night. Jack and Sarah plan a family meal for their anniversary. Vic has a surprise in store for Viv

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Sally wonders why Kevin is moody all the time. Alec warns Rita against going into partnership with Jack. Judy tells Gary about the laparoscopy and her abortion

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Gary is angry that Judy kept her abortion a secret. Steve is convinced he will win Fiona back. Kevin breaks down in front of Natalie, telling her he cannot cope

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The murder of a babysitter throws up a number of questions for Lewis and Hathaway - was she the intended victim or was the killer targeting her employers? Was the crime calculated or opportunistic? And why was she elaborately tied up after being murdered? As the detectives dig for clues, they are led into a world of suburban swinging and fetish photography, far removed from the Oxford they know. Gary Kemp (The Krays), Lucy Cohu (The Awakening), Ciaran McMenamin (Primeval) and Georgia Taylor (Casualty) guest star

programme.title: The Comedy Years
programme.desc: A look back at TV comedy from 1979. It was a pivotal year for Britain, with a new prime minister in Margaret Thatcher and mass strikes leading to the so-called 'Winter of Discontent'. Television saw a return to political satire, with the BBC series Not the Nine O'Clock News, though the northern club scene was dominating comedic output at the time with the likes of The Cannon & Ball Show and the stand-up series The Comedians. Narrated by Hugh Bonneville

programme.title: The Comedy Years
programme.desc: Comedy milestones of 1984, when cult hits like The Young Ones and Alas Smith and Jones battled it out in the schedules with more mainstream fare like Russ Abbot's Madhouse, and politicians were targeted by one of the most irreverent TV shows of all time - Spitting Image. Fans also lost two of the greatest comedy stars of all time - Tommy Cooper and Eric Morecambe. Narrated by Hugh Bonneville

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: Shaun Evans returns as the young Inspector Morse in the first of four feature-length episodes. A baffling suicide, an anguished father searching for his missing daughter and the smash-and-grab robbery of medieval artefacts throw the detective in at the deep end as he resumes his role with Oxford City Police following a four-month absence from duty. As the locals go to the polls in a closely fought by-election and a beauty contest builds to its conclusion, Endeavour must navigate the choppy waters of both worlds as his investigation shakes the highest pillars of Oxford society. Co-starring Roger Allam, Anton Lesser, James Bradshaw, Jack Laskey and Sean Rigby

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Businessman and owner of the Causton Lions rugby team Mark Adler is mysteriously found dead in the club's cryotherapy chamber, which is normally used by the players for physiotherapy. Barnaby and Winter are called in to investigate and their list of suspects soon includes Adler's wife Samantha, former coach Guy Bevan, troubled star player Danny Wickham and physio Neville Gallagher. Neil Dudgeon stars, with Tamzin Outhwaite, Don Gilet and Michael Maloney

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Hathaway and Lewis investigate the murder of a businesswoman connected with an organisation that supports gifted children, who had apparently been blackmailing the father of one particularly promising youngster. Further deaths follow, and as the body count rises, they realise there is a decades-old secret at the heart of the case. Matters are complicated still further by the presence in Oxford of former MI5 spymaster Grace Orde, who is visiting to sign copies of her tell-all memoir - which provides a vital clue to the killer's identity. Detective drama, guest starring Anna Chancellor and Cherie Lunghi, with Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The dapper detective accepts an invitation to spend yuletide at the house of an elderly millionaire who seems intent on provoking his money-grubbing sons into murdering him. At first he tries hard to ignore the strained atmosphere and relax - but soon finds himself with a gruesome mystery on his hands. Agatha Christie whodunit, starring David Suchet and Philip Jackson

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Japp and Poirot investigate the murder of an actress's estranged husband, only to find in the theatrical world, where deception and play-acting are a way of life, nothing is quite what it seems. programme.title: Carry On Doctor (1967)
programme.desc: A popular doctor is sacked after a misunderstanding ruins his reputation, prompting the furious patients to stage a revolt against the luckless medic's strait-laced superiors. Meanwhile, the hospital head has his own problems after becoming the unlikely romantic target of a strict matron. Comedy, with Frankie Howerd, Jim Dale, Sid James, Kenneth Williams, Charles Hawtrey and Hattie Jacques

programme.title: Willy Wonka and the Chocolate Factory (1971)
programme.desc: An eccentric confectionery king announces that five children will be given a tour of his wondrous factory. The winners turn out to be a kind-hearted boy from a penniless family and four obnoxious brats, who face a terrible fate when they misbehave. Musical fantasy, based on Roald Dahl's classic book Charlie and the Chocolate Factory, starring Gene Wilder, Jack Albertson, Peter Ostrum and Roy Kinnear

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Gina struggles to cope with Phil's death and refuses Carol's offer to prescribe her sleeping pills, determined to deal with things on her own. However, with the funeral scheduled for the next day, an emotional service that sees the whole of Aidensfield turning out to say their farewells to the much-loved bobby, it seems the grieving landlady is expecting too much of herself. Over at the station, Don is racked with guilt over the shooting of his colleague, convinced he should have taken the bullet. Despite George's reassurances, the bobby believes the villagers will blame him for the death of a close friend and decides to pack his bags - until the sergeant makes him a proposition. Meanwhile, the officers investigate the suspected suicide of a local teacher and Carol fails to report an elderly motorist involved in a hit-and-run with a cyclist, which proves particularly embarrassing when the victim turns out to be the hospital's new doctor. Leon Ockenden joins the cast

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Biff starts his job as Tara's chauffeur. Chris enjoys all the gossip about Steve and Kim's problems. Becky agrees that Emma can stay with the Sugdens

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Steve is furious with Kim for selling her shares in Home Farm. Vic and Viv arrange to spend more time together. Alan worries about trade at the Woolpack

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Mike gets an order for 25,000 knickers. Judy breaks down when she is told she si not able to have children. Jack is annoyed when Alec makes an offer for the pub

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Angie is surprised when Chris offers to move out. Sally tells Kevin she knows he is keeping something from her. Fiona tells Steve he is wasting his time pursuing her

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: A visiting American academic delivers a controversial speech, with many audience members worried his ideas could be used to target ethnic minorities. So when he is found hanged the next morning and Dr Hobson quickly discounts suicide, Lewis and Hathaway realise they have many suspects - from the local anti-racism activist who was first in voicing her disgust at the professor's beliefs to the women who had bombarded him with threatening e-mails. But then another body turns up and the case takes on a new dimension. David Soul and Patrick Baladi guest star

programme.title: Tommy Cooper Forever
programme.desc: First in a two-part tribute to the comedy magician, revealing how an act that started out in the desert during the Second World War went on to take the entertainment world by storm. Narrated by Martin Clunes and featuirng contributions from famous fans including Jennifer Saunders, Simon Callow, Lionel Blair, Anita Harris, Les Dennis and Jerome Flynn

programme.title: Tommy Cooper Forever
programme.desc: Part two of two. Singer and actress Anita Harris retraces her footsteps back to the London Palladium where she worked with Tommy. Comedian Les Dennis makes an emotional trip back to Her Majesty's Theatre to remember the night he saw Tommy's final performance. Plus, how Cooper became an unlikely comedy hero on Dutch TV in the 1960s

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: As England and Argentina kick off in the World Cup quarter-final, Oxford's streets are deserted. At an almost empty museum, Adrian Weiss, a specialist in heraldry and genealogy, is found dead - slain by a ceremonial dagger with links to 19th-century India. An entry in the visitors' book leads Morse to a girls' boarding school, where a note reading 'Save Me' is mysteriously slipped into his coat pocket. Digging into the building's troubled history, he finds a connection between Weiss's untimely fate and a series of unsolved murders that occurred on the school's grounds almost 100 years earlier. 1960s-set drama, starring Shaun Evans, with Roger Allam, Anton Lesser, James Bradshaw and Abigail Thaw

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When Barnaby is dragged along to the wedding of the son of Sarah's friend Hazel, the last thing he expects to find himself doing is investigating a murder. But when his wife discovers the body of the bride, Laurel, who has been squeezed to death by her own wedding dress corset, the detective must look more closely at his fellow guests. The victim's husband Gavin is convinced that his wife's death had everything to do with her outspoken nature on her radio show, so Winter's attention soon turns to her unique community of nocturnal listeners. Gavin's scorned ex-fiancee and local wedding dress designer Serena also comes under suspicion, and Barnaby and Winter's enquiries lead them to a local wedding fayre. Neil Dudgeon stars, with Kelly Brook, Nick Hancock and Liz Fraser

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Crime drama starring Brenda Blethyn. The detective investigates a fire that rips through a holiday park on the Northumberland coast, destroying three cabins. A young woman's body is discovered and the resort's owner, Jim Viner, fears the victim is his sister Deena when he returns from a weekend away with his daughter Clare. With Jim's suspicions confirmed, a police report then reveals Clare's boyfriend Ryan and his friends had been partying near the scene hours before the blaze started, but where are they now, and where is Deena's best friend Sally? Co-starring Kenny Doughty, Cush Jumbo and Jon Morrison

programme.title: Only When I Laugh
programme.desc: Norman's head is turned by a pretty nurse, but he is not the only one to have taken a shine to her. Medical sitcom set in the ward of an NHS hospital, starring James Bolam, Richard Wilson and Peter Bowles

programme.title: Auto Mundial
programme.desc: We take a look at a new performance SUV from Cupra and Ferrari's latest V8 supercar.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur gets his hands on the unreleased recording of a late, lamented pop star's final song, and decides to launch himself as a music-biz entrepreneur. Mel Smith guest stars, with George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A woman asks Holmes to search for her missing husband, a businessman who was last seen peering from the window of an opium den in London's notorious Limehouse area. Suspicion falls on a well-known local beggar - but his innocence is eventually proved in bizarre fashion. Period drama, starring Jeremy Brett

programme.title: Hornblower
programme.desc: Conclusion. Despite his reservations, Hornblower is reluctant to dishonour his bride-to-be by leaving her standing at the altar. However, with the ink barely dry on the marriage certificate, a surprise guest at the wedding breakfast despatches the groom to France on a mission to uncover the whereabouts of a missing sloop and its captain, Bracegirdle. En route, Hornblower rescues two strangers caught in a storm. Historical Navy drama, starring Ioan Gruffudd, Robert Lindsay, Paul McGann and Lorcan Cranitch

programme.title: Police Academy 6: City Under Siege (1989)
programme.desc: The clueless cops return yet again, this time to thwart the machinations of a crime lord behind a wave of raids and robberies in the city. Unfortunately, they are unaware Mr Big is always one step ahead thanks to a police informer. Penultimate entry in the comedy series, starring Bubba Smith, David Graf, Michael Winslow, Matt McCoy and Leslie Easterbrook

programme.desc: A reclusive industrial magnate asks Harry to engineer his brother's escape from a prison on a Mediterranean island, where he is being held on a trumped-up charge. Robert Vaughn, Nyree Dawn Porter and Tony Anholt star

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: An intruder begins breaking into people's homes and destroying their plaster statuettes of Napoleon, but leaving more valuable items untouched. Holmes resolves to find out why, eventually uncovering a twisted tale of theft and murder. Jeremy Brett stars as the master detective

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: Part one. Dempsey goes undercover as a small-time crook to snare an underhanded police commissioner

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur gets his hands on the unreleased recording of a late, lamented pop star's final song, and decides to launch himself as a music-biz entrepreneur. Mel Smith guest stars, with George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A captured British spy is released when his Russian counterpart falls into British hands. C15 is tasked with ensuring his safety as well as establishing whether his information is genuine. However, such intentions fail miserably when he is poisoned. Bodie and Doyle set out to determine what part his daughter, a concert pianist, played in his death - assuming she really is his daughter

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: An apparently respected gynaecologist's suitcase is stolen, but he is reluctant to reveal its contents. On further investigation the squad learns he was in the process of smuggling untaxed money out of the country and that a glamorous Latin woman with criminal connections, may hold the key to its whereabouts

programme.title: ITV Racing Live
programme.desc: Oli Bell presents coverage of the Grade 1 Savills Chase at Leopardstown. Plus, action from Leicester and Catterick. With analysis from Mick Fitzgerald, Andrew Thornton and Matt Chapman, and commentary by Richard Hoiles

programme.title: Force 10 from Navarone (1978)
programme.desc: Ten commandos risk their lives in Yugoslavia to destroy a bridge vital to the Nazis' success in entering the Balkans. However, tensions rise when it becomes clear there is a traitor in the ranks who is determined to sabotage the mission. Second World War adventure, a belated sequel to 1961 movie The Guns of Navarone, starring Harrison Ford, Robert Shaw, Edward Fox and Barbara Bach

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: The son of an ex-informant is kidnapped and the Flying Squad is brought in to assist in the hunt. Against Regan's advice his father, a wealthy businessman, pays the ransom and the boy is returned. However, the reunion quickly turns sour. Joss Ackland guest stars, with John Thaw

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Quiz hosted by Warwick Davis in which five members of a ukulele band answer questions about top 10 lists from the realms of pop culture and general knowledge, then try to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money

programme.title: Griff's Great Australian Adventure
programme.desc: Griff Rhys Jones takes his first tandem parachute jump from 12,000ft, to view an internationally renowned Australian landmark - Uluru, which is taller than the Eiffel Tower. He then catches a train from Alice Springs, stopping at a siding in the middle of the Outback near the opal mining town of Coober Pedy, where he fossicks through mullock with a local 'noodler'. Lastly, Griff travels 1,535kms south to Adelaide to experience just how extraordinary Australia is, meeting Barossa bakers, a snake catcher, and ending aboard the oldest passenger train in the country

programme.title: Passenger 57 (1992)
programme.desc: After his wife is shot dead during a robbery, a cop hands in his badge and takes up a job offer from an old friend to be a security adviser for a major transatlantic airline. On the flight taking him to his new employers in Los Angeles is an international terrorist being escorted to trial by the FBI - while the prisoner's accomplices are disguised as passengers and crew and plan to hijack the plane. Action thriller, with Wesley Snipes, Bruce Payne, Tom Sizemore, Alex Datcher, Bruce Greenwood and Elizabeth Hurley

programme.title: Rescue - River Deep, Mountain High
programme.desc: Documentary focused on rescue efforts across the British Isles, featuring access to Mountain Rescue teams, Coast Guard and air ambulances. In the first edition, a rescue team in Kerry is called to Carrantuohil, the highest mountain in Ireland, to rescue an American couple who have got lost and are experiencing some of the worst weather Ireland can produce. On the Humber estuary, the Humber Inshore Lifeboat is called to a reported body on the banks of the river, but the job turns out to be a false alarm

programme.title: Sport Filler Shows (2020)
programme.desc: A look back at a selection of sports covered by ITV during the 1980s

programme.title: Only When I Laugh
programme.desc: Glover hides from a vengeful Greek by having his head wrapped in bandages. Hospital comedy, starring Peter Bowles

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar agrees to help a girl find her missing brother and becomes embroiled in a drug-smuggling operation. Roger Moore and Burt Kwouk star

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Suffering from nervous exhaustion, Holmes sets off for a break on the wild Cornish peninsula, where he hopes the peace and quiet will help him convalesce. Unfortunately, several murders ensure his holiday is far from relaxing. Period detective drama, guest starring Denis Quilley

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: Dempsey is accused of murdering a small-time criminal, forcing Makepeace to put her career on the line as she attempts to uncover evidence to support his claims of innocence. Detective drama, starring Michael Brandon and Glynis Barber

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur's prestige as a pillar of the community is boosted by an invitation to address a meeting of his local Rotary Club - which is being held in the very hotel where Terry is acting as temporary house detective. However, a pair of thieves posing as priests and a mangeress equally as crooked as Arthur threaten to ruin his grand moment. Drama, starring George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A ministerial secretary innocently leaks information regarding a secret peace talks meeting to her lover, leading to a shooting incident and placing the future of the summit in jeopardy. While her boyfriend's involvement remains in doubt, Cowley gets her to pass on false information in the hope it will prove his innocence or confirm his guilt. Drama, starring Gordon Jackson, Lewis Collins and Martin Shaw

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Guest stars Eric Morecambe and Ernie Wise are entrusted to guard a consignment of heart pills by the girlfriend of the eminent research chemist developing the medicine. Before long, the comedy duo find themselves pursued by Middle Eastern operatives intent on procuring the new drug, as well as Sweeney officers who are trying to protect them. With John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: ITV Racing Live
programme.desc: Ed Chamberlin presents the final day of coverage in 2020, as Newbury takes centre stage with the Grade 1 Challow Hurdle today's feature race. Plus, four races from Leopardstown on the final day of the Irish Christmas Meeting. Analysis comes from Mick Fitzgerald and Luke Harvey, with reporting from Rishi Persad and Matt Chapman and commentary from Richard Hoiles

programme.title: Sport Filler Shows (2020)
programme.desc: A look back at a selection of the wide variety of sports covered by ITV during the 1990s, including Italia 90 and Euro 96

programme.title: Shalako (1968)
programme.desc: A party of European aristocrats on a hunting trip in New Mexico falls foul of marauding Apaches and the treachery of a guide, who abandons the group and makes off with their possessions. However, a US army scout knows of their presence in the territory and sets out to the rescue. Western, with Sean Connery, Brigitte Bardot, Jack Hawkins, Honor Blackman, Woody Strode, Peter Van Eyck and Eric Sykes

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Radio 2 DJ Jo Whiley, Benidorm barman Jake Canuso, Law & Order: UK's Georgia Taylor and comedian Marcus Brigstocke compete to win thousands of pounds for charity by taking on one of the show's resident trivia experts in a test of their general knowledge. programme.title: The Mountain
programme.desc: A look at the busy summer season, when it is all-hands-on-deck as the epic Snowdon Race brings runners from all over the world to the mountain. Farmers Jo and Fiona deal with the frustrations of the season's busy months as unruly pets attack their livestock, while big crowds bring problems for Rob and the mountain rescue team.

programme.title: The Mountain
programme.desc: Snowdon gradually falls silent in the winter months and the residents around the highest peak in England and Wales have it almost to themselves. Railwayman Steff shuts down the summit centre at Hafod Eryri as the season ends, while Alwena also calls temporary time on her Halfwacafe. Plus, wild swimmer Viv goes for a bracing winter plunge and Jo the mountain farmer finally sets foot on the summit of Snowdon for the first time.

programme.title: Brian Moore Meets
programme.desc: A classic 1981 interview with the golf legend, who was then at the peak of his powers at the age of 22. Moore travels to Seve's home town of Pedrana in Northern Spain to find out about his upbringing and examines his single-minded pursuit of excellence

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: A man who killed members of his family in their own home pleads not guilty on the grounds of insanity, but Quincy has his suspicions

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: An injured bare-knuckle boxer sparks off an investigation into an illegal organisation planning to distribute counterfeit currency. Michael Brandon and Glynis Barber star

programme.desc: A woman asks Holmes to search for her missing husband, a businessman who was last seen peering from the window of an opium den in London's notorious Limehouse area. Suspicion falls on a well-known local beggar - but his innocence is eventually proved in bizarre fashion. Period drama, starring Jeremy Brett

programme.title: Hornblower
programme.desc: Conclusion. Despite his reservations, Hornblower is reluctant to dishonour his bride-to-be by leaving her standing at the altar. However, with the ink barely dry on the marriage certificate, a surprise guest at the wedding breakfast despatches the groom to France on a mission to uncover the whereabouts of a missing sloop and its captain, Bracegirdle. En route, Hornblower rescues two strangers caught in a storm. Historical Navy drama, starring Ioan Gruffudd, Robert Lindsay, Paul McGann and Lorcan Cranitch

programme.title: Police Academy 6: City Under Siege (1989)
programme.desc: The clueless cops return yet again, this time to thwart the machinations of a crime lord behind a wave of raids and robberies in the city. programme.title: The Saint

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Suffering from nervous exhaustion, Holmes sets off for a break on the wild Cornish peninsula, where he hopes the peace and quiet will help him convalesce. Unfortunately, several murders ensure his holiday is far from relaxing. Period detective drama, guest starring Denis Quilley

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: Dempsey is accused of murdering a small-time criminal, forcing Makepeace to put her career on the line as she attempts to uncover evidence to support his claims of innocence. Detective drama, starring Michael Brandon and Glynis Barber

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur's prestige as a pillar of the community is boosted by an invitation to address a meeting of his local Rotary Club - which is being held in the very hotel where Terry is acting as temporary house detective. However, a pair of thieves posing as priests and a mangeress equally as crooked as Arthur threaten to ruin his grand moment. Drama, starring George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A ministerial secretary innocently leaks information regarding a secret peace talks meeting to her lover, leading to a shooting incident and placing the future of the summit in jeopardy. While her boyfriend's involvement remains in doubt, Cowley gets her to pass on false information in the hope it will prove his innocence or confirm his guilt. Drama, starring Gordon Jackson, Lewis Collins and Martin Shaw

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Guest stars Eric Morecambe and Ernie Wise are entrusted to guard a consignment of heart pills by the girlfriend of the eminent research chemist developing the medicine. Before long, the comedy duo find themselves pursued by Middle Eastern operatives intent on procuring the new drug, as well as Sweeney officers who are trying to protect them. With John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: ITV Racing Live
programme.desc: Ed Chamberlin presents the final day of coverage in 2020, as Newbury takes centre stage with the Grade 1 Challow Hurdle today's feature race. Plus, four races from Leopardstown on the final day of the Irish Christmas Meeting. Analysis comes from Mick Fitzgerald and Luke Harvey, with reporting from Rishi Persad and Matt Chapman and commentary from Richard Hoiles

Western, with Sean Connery, Brigitte Bardot, Jack Hawkins, Honor Blackman, Woody Strode, Peter Van Eyck and Eric Sykes

programme.title: The Mountain

Railwayman Steff shuts down the summit centre at Hafod Eryri as the season ends, while Alwena also calls temporary time on her Halfwacafe. Plus, wild swimmer Viv goes for a bracing winter plunge and Jo the mountain farmer finally sets foot on the summit of Snowdon for the first time.

Animated comedy, with the voices of Tom Kenny, Bill Fagerbakke, Clancy Brown and Scarlett Johansson, plus a cameo appearance by David Hasselhoff

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: Channel 4 News

Tim Burton's fantasy, starring Johnny Depp, Winona Ryder, Dianne Wiest and Vincent Price

programme.title: First Dates

Second World War drama, with Michael Redgrave, Richard Todd, Basil Sydney, Derek Farr and Ursula Jeans

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Deep Fakes: Can You Trust Your Eyes?
programme.desc: Morland Sanders investigates the world of fake internet videos and the effect they have on the lives of celebrities, ordinary people, and even whole nations. From embarrassing famous figures and influencing elections to bringing people back from the dead, the reporter asks how these fake videos and images have changed the world, and also learns how to make one, meets people whose lives have been made a misery by such fakes, and is taught how not to be fooled into believing everything you see

programme.title: Hollyoaks

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick, Angel, Dorothy and Arthur, as well as Angel's parents Jenni and Steve prepare to celebrate a family Christmas in France. With an old 19th-century chateau ledger found in the attic and classic cookbooks to hand, the Strawbridges take inspiration from Christmases past, discovering what food, festivities, gifts and games would have been like in bygone eras. Dick and Angel's imagination goes into overdrive as they create a winter wonderland with an ice rink at its heart. Later, as the family settles down to dinner, so the sound of traditional hand bells rings out across the chateau and they wonder if their exploration of the past will create chateau traditions for the future

Danny Boyle's drama based on Irvine Welsh's novel, starring Ewan McGregor, Robert Carlyle and Ewen Bremner

Period drama, starring Jodie Foster, Chow Yun-Fat, Ling Bai, Syed Alwi, Tom Felton and Randall Duk Kim

programme.title: Madagascar (2005)
programme.desc: A gang of streetwise penguins decides to escape from New York's Central Park Zoo and return to a life in the wild, but when Marty the zebra and his friends follow suit, they end up stranded in Africa on a jungle island without a clue about how to fend for themselves. Animated comedy, with the voices of Ben Stiller, David Schwimmer, Chris Rock, Jada Pinkett Smith and Sacha Baron Cohen

programme.title: Central Intelligence (2016)
programme.desc: Action comedy, starring Dwayne Johnson as a one-time geek who suffered constant humiliation at high school but grew up to be a lethal CIA agent. But when he is targeted by his own organisation, he comes home for a high school reunion, where he enlists the help of the former campus tough guy - now a meek accountant - who very quickly wonders what he has got himself into. Co-starring Kevin Hart and Amy Ryan

programme.title: Allied (2016)
programme.desc: A daring Canadian intelligence officer falls for a beautiful French resistance fighter during the Second World War. When they reunite in London, their relationship is tested by the pressures of conflict. Epic Robert Zemeckis thriller, starring Brad Pitt, Marion Cotillard and Jared Harris

programme.title: Mandy (2018)
programme.desc: The lives of a couple in a secluded forest are shattered by a nightmarish cult and their demonic-biker henchmen, sending lumberjack Red Miller on a blood-soaked quest for vengeance. Fantasy horror, starring Nicolas Cage, Andrea Riseborough and Linus Roache

programme.title: Danger: Diabolik (1968)
programme.desc: A masked criminal commits a series of daring heists for his girlfriend, but a police inspector and a criminal rival are soon on his trail. Action crime comedy, starring John Phillip Law, Marisa Mell, Michel Piccoli and Adolfo Celi

programme.title: Carry On Sergeant (1958)
programme.desc: A military sergeant approaching retirement hopes to end his career on a high note by seeing his last lot of recruits come first in an annual competition to find the best squad in the forces. However, he is not prepared for the hopeless band of misfits placed under his command. The first in the comedy series, starring William Hartnell and Bob Monkhouse

programme.title: Flushed Away (2006)
programme.desc: A pampered pet rodent is flushed down a toilet and ends up in a vast underground rat city in the sewers of London. He is befriended by a quick-witted rat who offers to help him find his way home, but first the hapless pair have to escape the clutches of an evil toad bent on ridding the rodent metropolis of its residents. Animated comedy, with the voices of Hugh Jackman, Kate Winslet, Ian McKellen, Shane Richie, Jean Reno and Bill Nighy

programme.title: Baggage Claim (2013)
programme.desc: An air hostess is horrified at the thought of her younger sister getting married while she is still single. She realises her job gives her access to eligible men from across America, and begins clocking up thousands of air miles as she scours the country for a potential fiance. Romantic comedy, with Paula Patton and Taye Diggs

programme.title: Percy Jackson: Sea of Monsters (2013)
programme.desc: The modern-day teenage son of the Greek god Poseidon must lead his friends on a perilous journey into the Bermuda triangle. They need to recover the legendary Golden Fleece to save the world, but getting to it means braving all manner of terrifying monsters. Fantasy adventure sequel, starring Logan Lerman and Alexandra Daddario

programme.title: Now You See Me 2 (2016)
programme.desc: A gang of magicians-turned-criminals is reunited for a comeback performance by a ruthless technology magnate, whose actual goal is to force the team into carrying out a seemingly impossible heist on his behalf. The illusionists realise their only hope of avoiding the law is to perform one last unprecedented stunt to expose the businessman's illegal activities. Crime thriller sequel, starring Jesse Eisenberg, Mark Ruffalo, Daniel Radcliffe and Morgan Freeman

programme.title: Forrest Gump (1994)
programme.desc: A slow-witted man has a series of bizarre adventures, including becoming an American football star, Vietnam veteran, table tennis champion and millionaire businessman - but the love of his life from childhood continues to elude him. Robert Zemeckis's Oscar-winning comedy drama, starring Tom Hanks, Sally Field, Robin Wright and Gary Sinise

programme.title: Chef (2014)
programme.desc: Carl Casper quits his job at a prestigious Los Angeles restaurant after refusing to compromise his creative integrity for the owner, and takes to the road to reignite his passion for the kitchen. He ends up in Miami, where he teams up with his ex-wife, his friend and his son to launch a food truck. Comedy, directed by and starring Jon Favreau, with Robert Downey Jr, Scarlett Johansson and Dustin Hoffman

programme.title: Bad Neighbours 2 (2016)
programme.desc: A couple who have finally rid themselves of the college fraternity next door become stuck with even worse new neighbours in the shape of a raucous college sorority. In desperation, they turn to their old enemies in getting rid of the new arrivals. Comedy, starring Seth Rogen, Zac Efron, Rose Byrne and Chloe Grace Moretz

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Omnibus. The McQueens continue to guess who is blackmailing them. Meanwhile, Edward has a plan to make sure that Tony never sees his family again

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos on the themes of exercise and pets

programme.title: We're Going on a Bear Hunt
programme.desc: Animated adventure, based on the popular children's bedtime book by Michael Rosen and Helen Oxenbury. Stan, Katie, Rosie, Max and the baby, along with Rufus the dog, all embark on a quest to find some bears. Trekking through whirling snowstorms, muddy bogs and dark forests, the siblings refuse to let anything get in their way. However, when Rosie and Rufus end up getting lost, bear-hunting suddenly doesn't seem quite so much fun after all. Featuring the voices of Olivia Colman, Pam Ferris and Mark Williams as Mum, Grandma and Dad respectively

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Charlie's Italian bistro in La Verne, southern California, where the owner's lack of business nous is putting her relatives' homes at risk, after her mother and sister put them up as collateral. To make matters worse, the restaurant's food is less than appetising and its long-serving chef seems to be incompetent

programme.title: Wife Swap USA
programme.desc: A sports-obsessed mother who believes that competition is the best way to push her kids to succeed swaps lives with a laid-back hippy wife who just wants everybody to chill out

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The young genius is forced to help Georgie revise for a maths test when poor grades threaten his brother's future on the football team. In doing so, he manages to pick up a few skills himself. US comedy, starring Iain Armitage and Montana Jordan

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The young genius moves to Dallas to attend a school for gifted children, the family struggles to cope without him around any more. US comedy, starring Iain Armitage

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: A worried Mary sends Sheldon off to Sunday school after she finds him playing Dungeons and Dragons with Tam and Billy, but Sheldon is soon inspired to study a variety of religions. US comedy, starring Iain Armitage

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The youngster asks for a computer and unknowingly sparks a heated argument between his parents over the family's finances, prompting Mary and the twins to move in with Meemaw. Iain Armitage stars

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Sheldon's germophobia lands him in detention when flu season hits Medford and he takes extreme measures to remain healthy. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: When Mary takes a job as church secretary, she finds herself becoming a marriage counsellor to Pastor Jeff. Sheldon and Missy spend their first afternoon at home alone. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage and Raegan Revord

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is bothered by the attention he receives in the wake of his heavy element discovery, but is taken aback when his work is disproved by Leonard. Meanwhile, Raj makes Howard and Bernadette feel inadequate when he stays with them for a week and is the perfect house guest

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon leaves for Texas when his sister goes into labour. While he is away, the rest of the friends decorate for Christmas and reflect on how much he has changed their lives. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny makes an important decision after Leonard tries to help her in the aftermath of a failed role on a TV show. Meanwhile, Raj and Stuart practise talking to strangers at a shopping centre, and Sheldon studies to become a comic genius. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tries to relax after he is forced to take a holiday, and when Penny quits her job the duo end up spending time together. Meanwhile, Leonard struggles to be supportive of his girlfriend's career decision, Bernadette seeks Stuart's help in replacing one of Howard's comic books, and Howard and Raj provide Amy with some advice. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When the guys are unable to get tickets for Comic-Con, Leonard, Howard and Raj decide to buy fake passes from a stranger - but they then worry about getting caught with them. Sheldon decides to hold his own comic-book convention and searches for a suitable star guest for the event. Meanwhile, the girls take tea at a hotel but discover that maturity is over-rated. Comedy, guest starring James Earl Jones and Carrie Fisher

programme.title: The Crystal Maze
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade guides a celebrity team through the four zones of the Maze, tackling a range of skill, mystery, physical and mental challenges. Pop star Faye Tozer steps up as team captain, with comedian Nick Helm, Hollyoaks actor and comedian Richard Blackwood, The Chase quizmaster Anne Hegerty and Jordan Stephens, half of the hip-hop duo Rizzle Kicks

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The best bits from the first heat of Junior Bake Off 2019. Thousands applied, but only 20 made it through to the famous Bake Off tent. Under the watchful eye of judges Prue Leith and Liam Charles, the first 10 young bakers face challenges with cake, biscuits, bread, desserts and pastry. Harry Hill hosts

programme.title: The Adventures of Tintin (2011)
programme.desc: A reporter's purchase of a model ship brings him under threat from a ruthless criminal, as it is one of a series of clues to the location of the real vessel, which holds a pirate's lost treasure. He sets off on a globetrotting quest to find it, assisted by a drunken sea captain, two bumbling detectives and his faithful dog. Steven Spielberg's animated adventure based on Herge's comic-strip series, with the voices of Jamie Bell, Andy Serkis and Daniel Craig

programme.title: Anchorman 2: The Legend Continues (2013)
programme.desc: Arrogant newsreader Ron Burgundy's career is rescued from a drunken slump by an executive for a new 24-hour news channel. Reassembling his team of sidekicks, he swiftly rises from the network's graveyard to become its biggest star with a run of ludicrously sensationalist broadcasts. Comedy sequel, starring Will Ferrell, Christina Applegate, Paul Rudd and Steve Carell

programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes a professional dancer from London who is seeking a man to lose his virginity with - and who can keep up with him on the dance floor. The second of this episode's contestants is a rugby player who has been out of the dating game for a while and is shy around women, but hopes that seeing a potential date naked will give him a confidence boost

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: The lads visit a Caravan Club meeting under the impression that it is really a massive orgy, but are embarrassed when Jay's dad decides to give them advice on sex - whether they like it or not. Sitcom about four teenagers growing up in suburbia, starring Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

To make matters worse, Aunt Sarah has recently started reading tarot cards and is predicting disaster for this trip - and it seems that for once, she might just be right.
